title: Discordant Radiologic and Biochemical Response With Inflammatory Activity in Metastatic Prostate Cancer: A Case Report.
snippet: Discordance between imaging findings and biochemical markers represents a significant diagnostic and therapeutic challenge in metastatic prostate cancer. We report the case of a 72-year-old male with high-risk prostate adenocarcinoma (Gleason 4+5=9) and extensive bone metastases, who demonstrated partial radiologic and metabolic response on prostate-specifi...
